chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 224 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.895/2021 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2021 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Khalil-ur-Rehman Shaikh, Additional Director, Directorate Health Services, Sukkur Division on behalf of Secretary Health..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Today, statement has been filed by the learned AAG along with copy of notification dated 27-09-2021, through which respondent No.5 has been relieved from the charge he was holding of BS-20. Accordingly, the Petition has served its purpose and is disposed of with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
